headline: How The Community Healthcare Trust (CHCT) Story Is Evolving Around Earnings Risks And Asset Sales
summary: Community Healthcare Trust’s fair value price target is steady at US$18.50, with no change from the prior estimate, even as other model inputs have been refreshed. That stable target sits alongside analyst research that clusters expectations in the mid to high teens and weighs steady execution against funding and tenant risks. As you read on, you will see how these target assumptions fit into the evolving narrative around balance sheet choices, earnings resilience, and the planned asset...
